name: analyze_cur
description: Analyze AWS Cost and Usage Report data with multi-account breakdown. Executes 10 Athena queries covering monthly totals, service comparisons, regional costs, charge types, daily trends, usage details, purchase options, RI/SP savings, and instance types. Defaults to current month vs previous month.

report_month.description: Report month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to current month.

compare_month.description: Comparison month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to previous month.
